meta.description: A role and its responsibility in a human procedure.

responsibility.description: What this role is responsible for.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_8c4c0eba_3590_4c9f_b18c_b6936fc28bb5" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "role" TEXT,
    "responsibility" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_8c4c0eba_3590_4c9f_b18c_b6936fc28bb5" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_8c4c0eba35904c9f_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
